headline: Domino's Pizza Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Domino's Pizza is expected to release its second-quarter earnings next month, with analysts projecting high-single-digit bottom-line growth.

raw.headline: Domino's Pizza Earnings Preview: What to Expect
raw.summary: Domino's Pizza is expected to release its second-quarter earnings next month, with analysts projecting high-single-digit bottom-line growth.

headline: A Tale Of Two Wendy’s: Beneath The Wild Meme-Stock Surge
summary: The company says its new strategy is working in the stores it runs itself. But the numbers from its franchise partners tell a very different story - even if a sudden wave of internet mania just completely upended the stock chart.

raw.headline: A Tale Of Two Wendy’s: Beneath The Wild Meme-Stock Surge
raw.summary: The company says its new strategy is working in the stores it runs itself. But the numbers from its franchise partners tell a very different story - even if a sudden wave of internet mania just completely upended the stock chart.
